items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the shared access level model (`free_busy`, `masked_details`, `full_details`). However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm or deny the existence of this model. The prior step evidence does not address this requirement, leading to an inconclusive status regarding its validation.
